collection: format / Super 8 Home Movie (nostalgia, mixed styles)

clips.title: Backyard Birthday
clips.prompt: Super 8 home movie film, warm amber cast, gate weave, dust and scratches, light-leak flares. Summer afternoon. A sunny backyard with balloons and a paper tablecloth. A person in a party hat leans over a birthday cake blowing out candles, cheeks puffed, family clapping around them. Streamers, a wagging dog, drifting smoke. Warm golden light. Silent-era jitter, family-archive nostalgia, 24fps.
